name: DDC CWICR v10.9 - Construction Cost Estimator Bot

parameters.content:
⭐ **If you find our tools helpful**, please consider **starring our repository** on [GitHub](https://github.com/datadrivenconstruction/OpenConstructionEstimate-DDC-CWICR). 

Your support helps us improve and continue developing open solutions for the community!

## 🔐 API CREDENTIALS SETUP

### ⬇️ Configure node `🔑 TOKEN` below:

```json
{
  "bot_token": "YOUR_BOT_TOKEN",
  "AI_PROVIDER": "gemini",
  "GEMINI_API_KEY": "YOUR_KEY",
  "OPENAI_API_KEY": "YOUR_KEY",
  "QDRANT_URL": "http://...",
  "QDRANT_API_KEY": "YOUR_KEY"
}
```





















---

### 📡 APIs Required (3 keys):

| # | API | Field | Get from |
|---|-----|-------|----------|
| 1 | Telegram | `bot_token` | @BotFather |
| 2 | OpenAI | `OPENAI_API_KEY` | platform.openai.com |
| 3 | Gemini | `GEMINI_API_KEY` | aistudio.google.com |


### ⚙️ Vision Provider:

`AI_PROVIDER`:
- `"gemini"` → Gemini 2.0 Flash
- `"openai"` → GPT-4 Vision

---

### ✅ Quick Start:

1. Get bot token from @BotFather
2. Get OpenAI key (for embeddings)
3. Get Gemini key (for vision)
4. Paste in `🔑 TOKEN` node
5. Set Telegram credential
6. Activate workflow!

## 🌍 UI Messages

Telegram menus:
- Language selection
- Photo request
- Analysis options
- Help text
- Error messages

All localized in Config node

## 🔀 Route Switch

**17 Actions:**

| # | Action | Description |
|---|--------|-------------|
| 0 | show_lang | Language menu |
| 1 | ask_photo | Request photo |
| 2 | lang_selected | Save language |
| 3 | show_analyze | Photo options |
| 4 | analyze | AI vision |
| 5 | show_edit_menu | Edit work |
| 6 | works_updated | Qty changed |
| 7 | ask_new_work | Add work |
| 8 | start_calc | Calculate |
| 9 | show_help | Help text |
| 10 | view_details | Work info |
| 11 | export_excel | CSV export |
| 12 | export_pdf | PDF export |
| 13 | process_pdf | PDF analysis |
| 14 | analyze_text | Text input |
| 15 | refine | Re-analyze |
| 16 | fallback | Unknown |

## 🌐 Config

**9 Languages:**
DE, EN, RU, ES, FR, IT, PL, PT, UK

**Contains:**
- UI messages
- Button labels
- Currency symbols
- Database mapping
- System prompts

**Auto-selects:**
- Database by language
- Currency by region

## 🧠 Main Router

Central message handler:

**Input:** Telegram Update

**Processing:**
- Parse message/callback
- Manage user sessions
- Detect content type
- Route to action

**Output:**
`action` → Route switch

## ✅ CHECKLIST

**1. Telegram Bot**
- [ ] Created via @BotFather
- [ ] Token in 🔑 TOKEN
- [ ] Credential configured

**2. OpenAI**
- [ ] API key obtained
- [ ] Added to 🔑 TOKEN

**3. Gemini/GPT-4**
- [ ] Vision API enabled
- [ ] Key configured

**4. Activation**
- [ ] Workflow active
- [ ] Webhook set

## ⚙️ Telegram Credentials

### Setup n8n Credential:

1. **Settings** → Credentials
2. **Add** → Telegram API
3. Enter Bot Token
4. **Save**

### Configure Trigger:
1. Select credential in `Telegram Trigger`
2. Set webhook mode
3. Activate workflow

### Test:
Send `/start` to your bot

## 🚀 DDC CWICR Pipeline
### Construction Cost Estimation Bot

**Version:** 10.3 Enhanced
**Author:** DataDrivenConstruction.io

**Features:**
- 📷 Photo analysis (GPT-4 Vision / Gemini)
- 📄 PDF floor plan processing
- 🔍 Vector search (Qdrant + OpenAI)
- 🤖 AI reranking for accuracy
- 📊 HTML/Excel/PDF export
- 🌍 9 languages supported

**Database:** 55,000+ construction rates

⭐ **Star our repo:** [GitHub](https://github.com/datadrivenconstruction/OpenConstructionEstimate-DDC-CWICR)

parameters.jsonBody: ={"chat_id": {{ $("📝 Prep Work Msg").item.json.chatId }}, "text": {{ JSON.stringify($("📝 Prep Work Msg").item.json._work_text) }}, "parse_mode": "Markdown"}

={
  "chat_id": {{ $json.chatId }},
  "text": "*DDC CWICR - Help*

*What is DDC CWICR?*
Open source construction cost database
https://DataDrivenConstruction.io

*Features:*
📸 Photo analysis with AI
📝 Text input with work lists
🌍 9 languages supported
📊 55,000+ work items
💰 Regional pricing (EUR, USD, RUB, etc.)
📄 Excel & PDF export

*How to use:*
1. Select your language
2. Send photo OR text description
3. Edit detected works if needed
4. Get cost estimate

*Commands:*
/start - New estimate

*Contact:*
GitHub: github.com/datadrivenconstruction/OpenConstructionEstimate-DDC-CWICR",
  "parse_mode": "Markdown",
  "reply_markup": {
    "inline_keyboard": [[{"text": "◀️ Back", "callback_data": "back_to_lang"}]]
  }
}

parameters.content:
## ✏️ Edit Menu

**Quantity controls:**
- +1, -1, +10, -10
- ×2, ÷2

**Actions:**
- 🗑️ Delete work
- ✅ Done editing
- ➕ Add new work

**Data:** Stored in StaticData

parameters.jsCode:
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DDC CWICR - Data Driven Construction Cost Estimator
// https://DataDrivenConstruction.io
// Open source construction cost database with 55,000+ work items
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// CONFIG v8.5 PRO - Professional style localization + PDF SUPPORT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

const input = $input.first().json;
const lang = (input.lang || 'EN').toUpperCase();
const chatId = String(input.chatId);
const sd = $getWorkflowStaticData('global');

const LANGS = {
  'DE': { 
    fallback_start: 'Drücken Sie /start um zu beginnen', 
    rooms: 'Räume', works_identified: 'Positionen', general: 'Allgemein', no_works: 'Keine Arbeiten', items: 'Positionen', min: 'Min', 
    db: 'DE_BERLIN_workitems_costs_resources_EMBEDDINGS_3072_DDC_CWICR', 
    name: 'German', flag: '🇩🇪', native: 'Deutsch', cur: 'EUR', sym: '€', loc: 'de-DE', region: 'Berlin', search_lang: 'German',
    // Professional welcome with PDF support
    ok: '✅ *Deutsch* · Berlin · EUR',
    photo: `*Foto, PDF oder Beschreibung senden*

📄 *PDF-Zeichnungen* — Grundriss oder Bauplan (max. 3 Seiten)
📷 *Foto* — Raum oder Objekt fotografieren
✏️ *Text* — Arbeiten als Liste beschreiben

_Beispiel zum Kopieren:_
\`\`\`
Gipskarton 2-lagig Metallprofil CW75 25m2
Fliesen Feinsteinzeug 60x60 Bad 15m2
Spachteln Q3 Decken und Waende 120m2
Elektro Steckdosen UP 20 Stueck
\`\`\`

Oder Foto/PDF senden 📷📄`,

    grand_total: 'कुल योग', labor_cost: 'श्रम', material_cost: 'सामग्री', labor_days: 'दिन',

    chart_cost_structure: 'संरचना', chart_labor: 'श्रम', chart_material: 'सामग्री', chart_machines: 'उपकरण',
    res_labor: 'श्रम', res_material: 'सामग्री', res_machine: 'उपकरण',

    quality_high: 'उच्च', quality_medium: 'मध्यम', quality_low: 'निम्न',
    export_excel_msg: 'Excel निर्यात', export_pdf_msg: 'PDF निर्यात', btn_refine: 'सुधारें', found_pct: 'मिला', more_resources: 'और', kpi_items: 'आइटम', scope_title: 'कार्य क्षेत्र', show_scope: 'देखें'
  }
};

const L = LANGS[lang] || LANGS['EN'];

// Update session with language data
if (sd.sess && sd.sess[chatId]) { 
  sd.sess[chatId].db = L.db; 
  sd.sess[chatId].L = L; 
}

// Get voice/PDF file IDs from session if available
const voiceFileId = sd.sess?.[chatId]?.voiceFileId || input.voiceFileId || null;
const pdfFileId = sd.sess?.[chatId]?.pdfFileId || input.pdfFileId || null;
const pdfFileName = sd.sess?.[chatId]?.pdfFileName || input.pdfFileName || null;

return { 
  json: { 
    ...input, 
    L: L, 
    db: L.db, 
    voiceFileId,
    pdfFileId,
    pdfFileName,
    // API Keys passthrough
    AI_PROVIDER: input.AI_PROVIDER || 'gemini',
    GEMINI_API_KEY: input.GEMINI_API_KEY,
    OPENAI_API_KEY: input.OPENAI_API_KEY
  } 
};

parameters.content:
## 👁️ Block 4: Vision Analysis Pipeline

**Photo Analysis Flow:**
```
Refine → Prep Download → Get File → Download → Convert Base64 → Merge → Prep Vision → Call API → Parse AI → Show Works
```

**AI Providers:**
- **Gemini 2.0 Flash** — Fast, multilingual
- **GPT-4 Vision** — High accuracy

**Output:** JSON with work items:
- name, qty, unit, conf, cat

## 📄 Block 5: PDF Floor Plan Processing

**PDF Pipeline:**
```
Download Prep → Get Path → Download → Split Pages → Loop → Vision per Page → Parse → Accumulate
```

**Features:**
- Multi-page PDF support
- Room detection per page
- Measurements extraction
- Aggregation across pages

## 🔄 Block 6: Calculation Loop

**Per Work Item:**
```
Prep Query → LLM Transform → Embedding → Qdrant Search → Rerank → Calculate → Update Result → Accumulate
```

**Vector Search:**
- OpenAI embeddings
- Qdrant vector DB
- 55,000+ construction rates

**AI Reranking:**
- LLM validates matches
- Quality scoring (●○◌✕)

## 📊 Block 7: Aggregation & Reports

**Final Processing:**
```
Cleanup → Delete Messages → Aggregate → Generate HTML → Final Message → Send HTML
```

**Report Contents:**
- Work items with resources
- Cost breakdown (Labor/Materials/Equipment)
- Quality indicators
- Total calculation

## 📥 Block 8: Export Options

**Available Exports:**
- 📊 **Excel (CSV)** — Spreadsheet format
- 📄 **PDF** — Professional document
- 🌐 **HTML** — Interactive report

**View Details:**
- Full resource breakdown
- Scope of work preview
- Rate codes & names

## 🔍 Vector Search Setup

**Qdrant Collections:**
- `DDC_CWICR_DE` — German
- `DDC_CWICR_EN` — English  
- `DDC_CWICR_RU` — Russian
- ... (9 languages total)

**To enable:**
1. Install Qdrant locally/VPS
2. Upload datasets from GitHub
3. Configure URL & API key

**Database:** 55,000+ rates
